data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for care instructions between appointments.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for care instructions between appointments, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The lack of specific evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or delivery of care instructions between appointments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify care instructions delivery
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check that care instructions are provided to patients between appointments.
